global.description: The ad features a bold orange background with prominent text and call-to-action elements.
global.main_message: Promoting a food delivery service with a sale and free delivery offer.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Empty space
elements.description: A blank area in the center of the ad, possibly for a product image or placeholder.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular shape located in the center, likely representing a button or icon.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: Another small circular shape positioned near the previous one, possibly for design consistency.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Your cravings, delivered' with a subtext in smaller font for delivery details.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Free delivery over $15

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: Large, bold text at the top reading 'PlateSprint SALE' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Start now' encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A small text displaying the price '€9.99' in a noticeable font at the bottom.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag at the top left corner labeled 'UGC' indicating user-generated content.
